hero.title: Payment Methods
hero.subtitle: Learn about the secure options to purchase your custom song.

intro: At ApolloSong, we prioritize security and transparency in every transaction. We use the most rigorous encryption standards to ensure your data is always protected.

creditCard.title: Credit & Debit Cards
creditCard.description: We accept all major cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover). On your statement, the charge will appear as **APOLLOSONG**.

digitalWallets.title: Digital Wallets
digitalWallets.description: For your convenience, we accept **Apple Pay** and **Google Pay**, allowing for a fast and secure checkout directly from your device.

security.title: Security & Stripe
security.description: Our global payments are processed by **Stripe**, one of the largest and most secure payment platforms in the world. We do not store your card details on our servers.

seo.title: Payment Methods | ApolloSong
seo.description: Learn about the payment methods accepted at ApolloSong, including Credit Cards and Digital Wallets via Stripe.
